modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about Time Ticket status in Self Service Banner

full_description_text: So, the user was trying to figure out what their Time Ticket is in the Self Service Banner. They called in and seemed a bit lost about the whole thing. It sounds like they just want to know what's going on with their hold or something like that.
short_description: Confusion about Time Ticket status in Self Service Banner
description: So, the user was trying to figure out what their Time Ticket is in the Self Service Banner. They called in and seemed a bit lost about the whole thing. It sounds like they just want to know what's going on with their hold or something like that.
